action.reasoning: Observation: DINOv2+DANN training completed (20 epochs, val BA 0.848), iteration took 1394s (23 min). No test eval yet. Previous SWAD approach gave 0.47 test BA. Analysis: need test performance to compare with earlier CLIP-based DANN (0.602) and decide if DINOv2 improves domain generalization. Decision: submit eval on best.pt to measure current test balanced accuracy and plan further steps. Remaining time: 1.19h, iterations: 23.
